/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/robot_interfaces/msg/detail/position__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/robot_interfaces/msg/detail/robot_state__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/projects/robo/build/robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/lyrical/lib: librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
